deals.Description: Fintech company developing USDh, a permissionless stablecoin pegged to the dollar. It aims to connect emerging markets to global dollar liquidity and sovereign yield opportunities.
Developing AI systems based on “world models,” designed to learn from spatial and real-world data rather than primarily predicting text or images.
deals.Investors: Shorooq, Cathay Innovation, Greycroft, Hiro Capital, HV Capital, Bezos Expeditions, Temasek, Nvidia, SBVA, Mark Cuban, Eric Schmidt, Xavier Niel
